name: 上课全对豪
prompt: Generate a single-character 3D clay/soft-vinyl collectible figure image. Use image 1 as the ONLY character (a yellow round-headed chibi creature wearing a black hoodie and black face mask with 'AW' logo, green eyes, arms crossed pose). THIS scene variant: the character is holding up a test paper with a big red '100' circle and a proud checkmark, one arm raised celebrating a perfect score. Keep the SAME art style as image 1: soft matte clay material, low-saturation colors, clean Q-version chibi proportions (big head small body). BACKGROUND: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff magenta (RGB 255,0,255) filling entire image, no shadows or gradients. Portrait orientation. Single character only.
